ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier for the dataset */,
  "byte_offset" INTEGER /* Byte offset for the dataset */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name and description of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., IEEE Single) */,
  "units_precision" TEXT /* Units and precision of the dataset (e.g., seconds / 0.1 nsec) */,
  "range" TEXT /* Range of values for the dataset (e.g., -99.0 to 1.000) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes for the dataset */,
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the spacecraft that collected the data */,
  "ground_station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ground station that received the data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_ground_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("ground_station_id") REFERENCES ground_stations ("ground_station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_spacecraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("spacecraft_id") REFERENCES spacecraft ("spacecraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spacecraft" (
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the spacecraft */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spacecraft */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the spacecraft */,
  "mission_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the spacecraft's mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacecraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ground_stations" (
  "ground_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ground station */,
  "ground_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the ground station */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ground station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the ground station */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the ground station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ground_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units_precisions" (
  "unit_precision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit and precision */,
  "unit_precision_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit and precision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit and precision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_precision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each range */,
  "range_name" TEXT /* Name of the range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_processes" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation process */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was validated */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation process */,
  "validation_result_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_processes_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
